text: Tiny sparks explode forth, forcing the attacker to make a DC [[2d6+8]] Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on their next attack!✨
The ground beneath the attacker becomes slick for 1 round, forcing a DC [[2d6+8]] Dexterity saving throw or causing them to fall prone!🛹
A small shockwave bursts outward, dealing [[2d6+8]] thunder damage to the attacker!🧨
The attacker is singed by magical fire, taking 1d6 fire damage a the beginning of their turn each round for [[d8]] rounds!🔥 ||(or until they spend an action to pat out the flames)||
The attacker’s weapon warps each time they make an attack against you for the rest of combat!⛓️‍💥 ||(imposes a permanent cumulative -1 penalty on attack rolls with that weapon)||
A flash of light erupts, forcing the attacker to make a DC [[2d6+8]] Constitution saving throw or be blinded for [[1d4]] rounds!☀️
The attacker is shifted back in time several seconds, forced to repeat their turn next round!⏲️
Dark tendrils rise from the ground, forcing the attacker to make a DC [[2d6+8]] Str Save or become restrained until the end of their next turn!⛓️
The attacker's weapon turns to quicksilver!🫗

The attacker regains hit points equal to half the damage dealt to you!💖

The attacker’s speed increases by [[2d4x5]] feet until the end of their next turn!📏

The attacker gains Growing Armor!🛡️||DM Note:||||+2 AC per round, -2 Dex per round as the armor grows out of control||
Attacker gains Raging Power!🐂||DM Note:||||+1d6 attack damage per turn, 1d6(+bonus) psychic damage per turn, instant kill at 0||
Attacker gains Titan's Growth!📏||DM Note:||||+1 foot per round, +2 Str per round, -2 Dex per round||
Attacker gains Burning Blade!❤️‍🔥||DM Note:||||Attacker is immune to pain, and gets a cumulative +1d6 fire damage to attacks each round. Takes 1d6(+bonus) fire damage each turn||
Attacker gains Arcane Shield!🛡️||DM Note:||||Each round attacker gains +1d4 to temporary hitpoint rolls, then gains 1d4 temporary hitpoints. Loses cohesion with matter, -1 Str and Dex per round||

Attacker gains Entropic Feedback!⏲️||DM Note:||||Can TPK! Attacker is set to initiative 1, and their initiative doubles each round. Under initiative 5, they can only take one action per round. At initiative 10, and then at 100 and every multiple of 10 thereafter, they take an extra action per round||

Attacker gains Cursed Fury!🐂||DM Note:||||Can TPK! Attacker has disadvantage to all Int and Wis tests. Attacker will blindly attack whatever it can until it passes out. Each round must pas a Wis save equal to damage it took last round or pass out. Each round, gains +2 to all melee damage||
Attacker gains Nyxbound Blessing!🕳️||DM Note:||||Attacker loses cohesion with the material plane, -2 Str per round, +2 spell proficiency per round. If they were a caster, they might be back someday||

Attacker gains Nyxbound Burden!🕳️||DM Note:||||Each round, attacker is bound by another tendril of shadow, reducing their speed by 5 feet per tendril. Each turn they take d4 damage per tendril, body is claimed by Nyx at 0hp. If they are a caster, they might be back someday||
